appraisal_events.evidence: Il « grommelait » sur les domestiques; il est « très mal élevé » et « ses paroles déplaisaient »; son anecdote sur Sir Rufus Israël « resta incompréhensible » aux présents, le prestige étant mal évalué dans le milieu Guermantes.
appraisal_events.explanation: Bloch is presented as nervous and socially awkward; his speech and prestige codes are unsuitable for the audience, which makes him look bad rhetorically and socially.

status_effects.explanation: His intervention and anecdote miss their effect and clash with the audience, weakening his position as a speaker in the scene.
